title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

The ear pieces fit comfortably and great sound quality. I like that they are wireless and comfortable to wear.

reviews.title: Amazing ear pad replacements for the Logitech G35 headset!
reviews.text:
- Makes my G35 headset look better than when I bought it new thanks to the red accent markings!
- The installation tool was extremely helpful, and thanks for including it.
- Just a bit of warning for others the kit that includes the head pad isn’t mean for the Logitech G35 headset, because it is a different size and it doesn’t have Velcro underneath the head pad. I just ordered the ear pads only, and ended up using the spare two fake leather head pads that came with my G35 headset.
- Other thoughts: Not sure what some people are complaining about, but my ear pads are comfortable and fit my headset well. I’m just going to assume some peoples ears are extremely sensitive than others to certain fabrics. I like the cloth mesh pads compared to the original leather pads for two reasons. The cloth won’t crack or peel off like the leather pads, and the cloth pads are more breathable for the ears (ears won’t get hot or humid).

reviews.title: They are comfortable, which is the main thing
reviews.text: I bought these for my G930 since the outside was flaking off of mine a lot. I have been using these for almost 5 months and I have had no issues out of them. They are comfortable, which is the main thing. And since it isn't the fake leather of the original, I dont have a problem with it causing my ears to sweat or stick to it. Installing them were simple as well.

reviews.title: Barely noticeable difference between these pads and the official Logitech pads
reviews.text: The only difference in these pads is that the mesh is slightly rougher than that of the ear pads that come with the Logitech G430 headphones. Otherwise, there is no noticeable difference.

reviews.title: great replacement for my G930
reviews.text: I bought these blue mesh ear pads to replace my original fake leather pads on my Logitech G930 headphones. These went on super easily, took no effort, and are a perfect fit. They also come with a little tool to help slide the pads on but i didn't even need it. I also like the mesh pads because my ears stay a bit cooler than on the original leather-ish ones. These are a great value for the price, and I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Good but scratchy.
reviews.text: They fit perfectly on my Logitech g35s but they are very scratchy.

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

reviews.text: These don’t connect to a number of my Bluetooth devices. Basically only phones and tablets work with them. So I tried to use the AUX cord, and as soon as you turn it on with the aux cord in or plug it in when they’re already on, they shut off. Even in the directions it says they shut off….then why add it??? Even after they shut off, I tried to see if they worked anyway since the directions say that. They don’t. If they only connect to phones & tablets through Bluetooth only, it needs to say that.

description:
Inner diameter: 3mm Outer diameter:12.5mmSize: Medium QTY: 6 pairs
NO EAR FATIGUE.
These foam earphone tips are softer than silicone tip material, Great elasticity and recovery make the tips perfectly fit your ear canal, very comfortable.
BETTER COMFORT
Slow-rebound material, uniquely breath-activated earmuffs activated by body temperature, gives you a new experience without irritation or fatigue.
PREMIUM SOUND.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
MORE ISOLATION
With the ear canal properly sealed by the earbud tips, you don't need to increase volume to enjoy music in a noisy environment.
LITTLE USING TIPS
Before wearing earbuds, squeeze the sponge tips with your hands, so they will automatically inflate and perfectly fit your ear canal after wearing. That will create better sound insulation. The memory foam is about 11mm high, the largest diameter is about 12mm, and the inner diameter of the catheter is about 3mm.Made of high-quality, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, it has the advantages of softer, slower rebound and more durable. Memory foam is characterized by a slow rebound effect, which can change its own shape with external pressure. From the perspective of earplugs, the ear canal varies from person to person, and the memory foam will change their shape according to the individual's ear canal, making them fit the ear canal best, thus achieving more than ordinary eartips cover good wearing comfort, better noise reduction effect, bring better listening experience. features: 6 Pairs of replacement tips fit on 3mm cavity tube diameter for balanced armatured in-ear monitor.Please measure the outer diameter of your earplug cavity tube before purchasing, and refer to the picture to obtain the appropriate model.
The only earbud tips that adopt separate packaging; each pair is individually packed in its own little baggie; convenient for storage.
Not like other cheap earphone tips, these are high quality memory foam ear bud tips which would not fall apart or disintegrate.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
Before wearing, you may need to squeeze the ear tips and put them in your ear and they expand to fit. These are pretty stretchy and stay in place.

reviews.title: Not a quality product

The tubes don't stretch to wrap around the tip of the earbud the way quality products do and the tubes are apparently not glued to the memory foam as they separate when you're trying to install them.

title: Skullcandy Jib True Wireless Earbud with Microphone / 22 Hour Battery Life / Use with iPhone and Android / Best for Gym, and Gaming / Bluetooth Earbud Headphones - Black/Orange
description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!
Buy With Confidence - 1 year manufacturer's warranty included with the Jib, be sure to wear your earbuds with full confidence.
